metadata.title: Khyaal Engineering Pulse
metadata.vision: Become the leading platform for active aging and community engagement for seniors in India, delivering exceptional experiences through technology, personalized service, and meaningful connections.

epics.name: Platform Modernization Epic
epics.objective: Modernize legacy systems and enhance platform capabilities
epics.scope: Website migration, 50Above50 improvements, CRM integration, API enhancements
epics.keyDeliverables: 29 pages migrated, subscription launch, security hardening
epics.successMetrics: Page speed improvement 40%, revenue growth, security compliance 95%+

epics.name: Analytics & Intelligence Epic
epics.objective: Build comprehensive data foundation and AI capabilities
epics.scope: CDP development, analytics dashboards, AI agents, recommendation engines
epics.keyDeliverables: Gold Tier analytics, sales AI agents, ML recommendations
epics.successMetrics: Data-driven decisions 80%+, AI conversion 15%+, recommendation accuracy 85%+

epics.name: Infrastructure Optimization Epic
epics.objective: Optimize cloud infrastructure and enhance security posture
epics.scope: AWS to GCP migration, cost optimization, monitoring setup
epics.keyDeliverables: Cost reduction 30%, improved monitoring, security compliance
epics.successMetrics: Infrastructure cost savings 30%+, system uptime 99.9%+, security response < 1hr

okrs.objective: Modernize platform infrastructure and achieve security excellence

keyResults.description: Migrate 100% of legacy pages to new platform
Launch $99 subscription tier with payment processing

okrs.objective: Build data-driven decision foundation with AI capabilities

keyResults.description: AI Sales Agent achieving 15%+ conversion rate

okrs.objective: Reduce infrastructure costs and improve reliability

sprints.name: Foundation Sprint
sprints.goal: Establish platform foundation and security baseline

sprints.name: Migration Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete legacy page migration and launch subscription

sprints.name: Security & AI Sprint
sprints.goal: Launch subscription service and initiate AI agent development

sprints.name: Enhancement Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete security compliance and launch analytics capabilities

sprints.name: Integration Sprint
sprints.goal: Launch advanced features and complete integration work

releases.name: v2.1 Platform Foundation
releases.features: 29 legacy pages migrated, $99 subscription launch, basic security
releases.successCriteria: All pages migrated with 30% performance improvement, subscription processing payments
releases.impact: Improved user experience, new revenue stream, security baseline

releases.name: v2.2 Security Hardening
releases.features: VAPT completion, crypto redirect fixes, security monitoring
releases.successCriteria: All critical VAPT issues resolved, security monitoring active

releases.name: v3.0 Analytics Intelligence
releases.features: Gold Tier analytics, AI Sales Agent pilot, CDP dashboards
releases.successCriteria: Analytics dashboards deployed, AI agent pilot running with 10%+ conversion
releases.impact: Data-driven decisions, AI-powered sales, comprehensive analytics

releases.name: v3.1 Personalization Engine
releases.features: Recommendation engines, template-based events, app-code authentication
releases.successCriteria: Recommendation accuracy 85%+, event templates deployed, authentication working
releases.impact: Personalized user experience, scalable event management, seamless authentication

items.note: Implementing Google reCAPTCHA v3 on all user-facing forms to prevent bot submissions and spam.
items.usecase: Reduces spam form submissions by 95%+ and protects platform from automated attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: reCAPTCHA v3 integrated on all forms
Score threshold configured appropriately
Fallback to v2 for low scores
Form submission analytics tracking spam reduction

items.note: Created a dedicated page for the event.
items.usecase: Helps users register and access event details easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page is live
Registration form works
Event details are accurate

items.note: Implementing comprehensive event tracking instrumentation across all user touchpoints (page views, clicks, form submissions, navigation events) to capture complete user journey data in Pulse analytics platform.
items.usecase: Enables complete funnel analysis and user journey visualization, reducing blind spots in analytics by 100% and improving conversion optimization capabilities by 40%.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical user events tracked (pageview, click, submit, navigate)
Events appear in Pulse dashboard within 30 seconds
Zero data loss - event buffering and retry logic implemented
Event schema validated and documented

items.note: Building automated notification system to track legacy page migration progress with Slack alerts on completion milestones and automated weekly progress reports showing pages migrated, performance improvements, and remaining work.
items.usecase: Reduces manual status update effort by 80%, improves stakeholder visibility, and ensures migration momentum through proactive reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Slack alerts trigger on migration milestones (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
Weekly automated reports generated with migration metrics
Alert delivery reliability >99%
Stakeholder distribution list configurable

items.note: Building headless CMS component library with reusable content blocks (Hero, Feature Grid, Testimonials, CTA, Event Listing) using drag-and-drop interface powered by React Beautiful DnD, enabling marketing team to compose pages without engineering involvement.
items.usecase: Reduces page creation time from 2 days to 2 hours (90% reduction), eliminates engineering bottleneck for marketing campaigns, and improves content iteration velocity by 10x.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 5 production-ready blocks (Hero, Features, Testimonials, CTA, Events)
Drag-and-drop builder with live preview functional
Content team trained and can create pages independently
Block library documented with usage examples

items.note: Systematically remediating all critical and high-priority vulnerabilities identified in Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) report including SQL injection risks, XSS vulnerabilities, insecure authentication, missing security headers, and sensitive data exposure.
items.usecase: Achieves 95%+ security compliance target, eliminates critical attack vectors, protects user data, and meets regulatory requirements for secure platform operations.
acceptanceCriteria: All 12 critical VAPT findings resolved and verified
All 18 high-priority issues addressed
Re-scan passes with <5 medium findings
Security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options) implemented

items.note: Implementing secure redirect whitelist validation to prevent open redirect vulnerabilities, adding cryptographic signature verification for redirect URLs, and implementing referrer policy headers to protect against phishing and malicious redirect attacks identified in VAPT audit.
items.usecase: Eliminates open redirect vulnerability (OWASP Top 10), prevents phishing attacks using platform domain as trusted intermediary, and protects users from crypto-related scams leveraging redirect weaknesses.
acceptanceCriteria: Whitelist-based redirect validation enforced for all redirects
HMAC signature verification implemented for dynamic redirects
Malicious redirect attempts logged and blocked
All legitimate user flows tested and working (payment callbacks, OAuth, etc.)

items.note: Building flexible event page template system with pre-designed layouts (Conference, Workshop, Tour, Community Gathering) using parameterized components for rapid event page creation. Templates include registration forms, schedule widgets, speaker profiles, and venue maps with schema.org structured data for SEO.
items.usecase: Reduces event page creation time from 8 hours to <1 hour (87% reduction), ensures consistent UX across all events, improves SEO with structured data, and enables marketing team to launch events independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 3 event templates deployed (Conference, Workshop, Tour)
Template variables documented (title, date, location, speakers, schedule)
Marketing team can create event page in <1 hour without dev support
All templates include schema.org Event markup for rich snippets

items.note: Implementing comprehensive event tracking for 50Above50 website covering user interactions (course views, certificate downloads, bundle purchases, category browsing, search queries) to enable complete attribution and funnel optimization in Pulse analytics.
items.usecase: Enables accurate campaign ROI measurement, identifies drop-off points in purchase funnel (expected 30% conversion improvement), and provides data foundation for personalized recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: All user interaction events tracked (view, click, search, purchase)
Events appear in Pulse dashboard with <1 minute latency
Multi-step funnel analysis functional (browse → view → cart → purchase)
UTM parameters captured and attributed correctly

items.note: Addressing security vulnerabilities identified in VAPT assessment for 50Above50 platform including input validation gaps, session management weaknesses, and exposed admin endpoints. Lower priority than main platform due to limited PII and smaller attack surface.
items.usecase: Enhances security posture for 50Above50 platform, protects course content and user data, and maintains consistent security standards across all Khyaal properties.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical and high findings from VAPT report resolved
Input validation implemented on all user-facing forms
Admin endpoints properly secured with authentication
Security re-scan passes with acceptable risk level

items.note: Enhancing the speed and reliability of CRM data synchronization during migration.
items.usecase: Ensures CRM data is accurate, up-to-date, and reliable for reporting and decision-making.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration completes successfully
Data integrity is maintained
Sync performance improved by 50%
items.blockerNote: Waiting on Zoho customer support response

items.text: Membership status sync via Razorpay to Pulse
items.note:
update: pushed on dev and shared the reference file to reefaq for testing journey based on the above implemented event.

Capturing all membership status updates (e.g., initiated, charged, started, cancelled, expired) and sending them to Pulse via Razorpay webhook triggers.
items.usecase: Provides complete visibility of the user membership lifecycle for better tracking, automation, and engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: All webhook events are captured
Events are sent to Pulse reliably
Journey automation works

items.note: Building RESTful API infrastructure for upcoming Centerstage product vertical including artist/performer management, event coordination, booking workflows, and content distribution endpoints. Architecting with extensible design patterns to support future feature expansion.
items.usecase: Enables launch of new Centerstage product line for connecting performers with senior audiences, unlocks new revenue stream (projected $50K/month), and establishes API architecture patterns for future verticals.
acceptanceCriteria: Core API endpoints implemented (artists, events, bookings, content)
JWT-based authentication and role-based authorization working
API documentation published with Swagger/OpenAPI spec
Rate limiting and security headers configured

items.note: Implementing Redis-based queue architecture (Bull/BullMQ) for Centerstage backend to handle asynchronous tasks including video transcoding, notification delivery, content distribution, and booking confirmations. Enables horizontal scalability and graceful degradation under load.
items.usecase: Improves system throughput by 400%, enables processing of 1000+ concurrent bookings, provides job retry/failure handling (99.9% reliability), and supports future scale to 10K+ users without infrastructure redesign.
acceptanceCriteria: Redis queue system deployed with Bull/BullMQ
All async tasks migrated to queue (video, notifications, distribution)
Job monitoring dashboard showing queue health and throughput
Performance benchmarks show 4x improvement in concurrent request handling

subtracks.name: Adhoc (Community Support, Data Extraction Support, Emailers, Others)

items.note: It took 1.30 hr. I started on 10.40 AM.
acceptanceCriteria: Emailer sent successfully

items.note: Building gamification system to track consecutive user activity streaks (event attendance, course completion, community participation) with visual streak indicators, milestone badges, and optional rewards to drive engagement through positive reinforcement and habit formation.
items.usecase: Increases daily active users by 35% through habit formation, improves event attendance consistency by 50%, creates viral sharing moments when users achieve streak milestones, and provides retention metric directly correlated with LTV.
acceptanceCriteria: Streak calculation engine tracks daily/weekly activity across all touchpoints
User dashboard displays current streak with visual progress indicators
Milestone notifications sent at 7, 30, 90, 365-day streaks
Streak freeze/recovery mechanism (1 miss per 30 days) to prevent discouragement

items.text: Support for app-code authentication in API
items.note: Implementing passwordless authentication flow using time-limited app-generated codes or QR scans to enable seamless web-to-app authentication for joining Zoom events, accessing personalized content, and cross-device experiences without OTP friction. Uses TOTP-based temporary codes with 5-minute expiry.
items.usecase: Eliminates SMS OTP friction (improves conversion by 25%), enables one-click event join from web browser authenticated via mobile app, reduces authentication abandonment from 40% to <5%, and provides superior UX for users already logged into mobile app.
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile app generates TOTP-based temporary codes (5-min validity)
Web API endpoint validates codes and issues short-lived JWT (1-hour)
QR code flow functional for same-device and cross-device scenarios
Failed authentication attempts rate-limited and logged

items.note: Strategic planning initiative to transition 50Above50 experience from standalone web platform into integrated in-app journey within main Khyaal mobile app, including content migration strategy, deep linking architecture, user migration communication, and analytics preservation approach.
items.usecase: Consolidates user touchpoints to increase app engagement by 60%, reduces platform maintenance overhead by 40%, improves cross-selling between Khyaal and 50Above50 offerings by 3x, and provides unified user experience reducing cognitive load.
acceptanceCriteria: Detailed transition roadmap documented with 3-phase approach
User journey mapping complete for all 50Above50 features in-app
Content migration strategy defined (courses, certificates, user data)
User communication plan and timeline established

items.text: Events listing and joining via Web Zoom SDK
items.note: Building frictionless event discovery and join experience using Zoom Web SDK, enabling users to browse upcoming events and join directly from browser without OTP/password login. Authentication via app-generated code or QR scan (dependency on platform-api-8). Includes real-time event schedule, capacity indicators, and one-click join.
items.usecase: Reduces event join friction by 70% (no OTP required), increases event attendance by 45% through easier access, enables viral sharing of event pages (direct join links), and expands reach to users who haven't downloaded app yet (30% of audience).
acceptanceCriteria: Real-time event listing showing schedule, capacity, speakers
One-click join using Web Zoom SDK without separate authentication
QR code/app-code authentication flow integrated (uses platform-api-8)
Event join success rate >95%, load time <2 seconds

items.text: Fix Journey first node identification flag
items.note: Implementing validation logic in Journey Builder to enforce exactly one entry node (fromTriggerNode: true) before allowing save/publish operations. Adding clear error messaging and visual indicators in UI when entry node is missing or multiple entry nodes exist, preventing runtime journey failures.
items.usecase: Prevents 100% of journey execution failures caused by missing/ambiguous entry points (currently ~15% of journeys fail), reduces support tickets by 40%, improves journey builder UX with real-time validation feedback, and ensures all published journeys are executable.
acceptanceCriteria: Save/publish blocked if zero or multiple fromTriggerNode:true nodes exist
Clear error toast/banner shows specific issue and resolution steps
Visual indicator in canvas highlights entry node or shows missing entry state
Existing journeys with invalid state flagged for review in dashboard

items.text: Sales Agent – Specific Tours Pilot launch testing, stakeholder alignment
items.note: Conducting internal pilot of AI Sales Agent for specific tour packages with 20-30 controlled test calls, gathering stakeholder feedback from sales team and management, refining conversation flows based on real interactions, and validating conversion metrics before full-scale deployment.
items.usecase: De-risks AI agent deployment through controlled validation (prevents potential brand damage), achieves internal buy-in from sales team (critical for adoption), establishes conversion baseline (target 10-15% in pilot), and identifies edge cases for prompt refinement before scaling to 1000+ calls/month.
acceptanceCriteria: 20-30 pilot calls completed with recorded transcripts and outcomes
Stakeholder review meeting conducted with sales and management teams
Conversion rate measured and documented (target: 10-15%)
Feedback incorporated into prompts and edge case handling improved

items.note: Finalizing conversation scripts including sales pitch, closure, and intent/ratings handling.
items.usecase: Improves quality of conversations and increases chances of successful conversions.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompts are finalized
Conversation quality improved
Conversion rate increased

items.text: Plivo setup for India & recording feasibility
items.note: Setting up Plivo for Indian numbers and checking recording support and associated costs. Manual recording remains a fallback option.
items.usecase: Enables scalable calling infrastructure for India with clarity on recording capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Plivo setup complete
Recording feasibility assessed
Cost analysis done

items.note: Exploring call recording setup with Plivo, including feasibility and cost. Manual recording is possible but requires additional effort.
items.usecase: Helps review calls, improve quality, and maintain records for training and compliance.
acceptanceCriteria: Recording system evaluated
Cost-benefit analysis complete
Implementation plan ready

items.note: Engineering 50+ Gold Tier analytical features from raw event data including behavioral aggregations (30-day activity scores, event participation rates), engagement metrics (session duration, interaction depth), temporal patterns (weekly activity cycles, preferred time slots), and derived attributes (user lifecycle stage, churn risk indicators) using Spark/pandas for batch processing.
items.usecase: Transforms raw event streams into actionable business intelligence enabling segmentation accuracy improvement of 60%, predictive model performance boost of 45% (AUC score), and unlocks advanced analytics dashboards showing behavioral cohorts, engagement trends, and retention drivers.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 50 features engineered covering behavioral, temporal, and engagement dimensions
Feature documentation includes business definition, calculation logic, and usage examples
Data quality validation shows <5% null values and logical consistency checks pass
Features materialized in Gold Tier tables with daily refresh schedule

items.note: Designing normalized dimensional data models for Gold Tier analytics layer using Kimball methodology - implementing fact tables for user events/sessions, dimension tables for users/content/time, and slowly changing dimensions (SCD Type 2) for tracking attribute history. Optimizing schema for analytical query performance with partitioning and indexing strategies.
items.usecase: Provides structured, query-optimized data foundation enabling 10x faster analytics queries (vs Bronze/Silver layers), supports complex joins and aggregations for BI dashboards, ensures data lineage and auditability, and establishes scalable schema for future analytics expansion.
acceptanceCriteria: Star schema implemented with fact and dimension tables documented
Schema documentation includes entity relationships and cardinality
Data migration scripts tested for Bronze/Silver → Gold transformation
Query performance benchmarks show 10x improvement over raw data

items.note: Defining and implementing 20+ business-critical metrics for Gold Tier including engagement KPIs (DAU/MAU, session duration, feature adoption), conversion metrics (funnel completion rates, revenue per user), retention indicators (cohort retention curves, churn probability), and operational metrics (data freshness, pipeline health) with automated quality monitoring.
items.usecase: Establishes single source of truth for business metrics eliminating conflicting numbers (current 40% variance), enables real-time business health monitoring, provides automated alerting for anomalies (>20% deviation), and supports data-driven decision making across all teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 20 business metrics defined with clear calculation logic documented
Metrics accessible via dashboards with drill-down capabilities
Automated alerts configured for anomalies and threshold breaches
Metric validation shows <3% variance vs. source systems

items.note: Publishing user-facing dashboards with key metrics and insights.
items.usecase: Makes data-driven insights easily accessible for teams to monitor performance and make informed decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboards are live
Real-time updates work
User feedback is positive

items.note: Building and finalizing ~50 ML features including propensity, time-series, standard deviation, and averages.
items.usecase: Improves model accuracy and strength of recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: 50+ ML features built
Features validated
Model accuracy improved

items.note: Integrating long-term and contextual memory using Mem0 and Neo4j.
items.usecase: Enables deeper personalization based on user memory and behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Mem0 integration complete
Neo4j setup working
Persona engine live

items.note: Building recommendation models using historical (cold) data.
items.usecase: Predicts user needs and preferences proactively.
acceptanceCriteria: Model trained on historical data
Prediction accuracy >80%
System deployed to prod

items.note: Developing real-time recommendations based on live (hot) data.
items.usecase: Delivers real-time, context-aware recommendations to improve engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Real-time processing works
Latency <200ms
User engagement improves

subtracks.name: Pages – Headless CMS
subtracks.note: A centralized content system enabling teams to create once and reuse content across the platform without engineering dependency.

items.usecase: Show entire user persona based on 90 days lifecycle on khyaal platforms
acceptanceCriteria: 360 view shows complete user data
90-day history displayed
Persona insights generated

items.note: Introducing personalization within flows using user data and behavior.
items.usecase: Enables dynamic, user-specific journeys to improve engagement and outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: Personalization engine integrated
User journeys adapt dynamically

items.note: Upgrading the AI assistant with improved intelligence, context handling, and response quality.
items.usecase: Provides smarter, more contextual assistance to enhance user engagement and support.
acceptanceCriteria: Context handling improved
Response quality increased
User satisfaction >90%

items.note: Enable dynamic logic creation within user journeys using custom expressions for advanced personalization and decision-making.
items.usecase: Allow defining dynamic conditions to control journey flow, enabling personalized actions and branching based on user data.
acceptanceCriteria: Expression language defined
Builder UI supports expressions
Dynamic branching works

items.note: Implementing comprehensive AWS cost optimization strategy including rightsizing EC2 instances based on utilization metrics, migrating infrequent access data to S3 Glacier, implementing auto-scaling policies, removing idle resources, and negotiating Reserved Instance commitments for baseline workloads to achieve 30% cost reduction without performance degradation.
items.usecase: Reduces monthly AWS spend by 30% ($15K → $10.5K savings/month, $180K annually) while maintaining 99.9% uptime, frees budget for innovation initiatives, establishes ongoing cost monitoring culture, and provides infrastructure cost transparency enabling better technical decision-making.
acceptanceCriteria: Monthly AWS bill reduced by 30% vs. baseline (tracked month-over-month)
Application performance metrics unchanged (p95 latency, error rates)
Cost monitoring dashboard deployed with resource-level attribution
Auto-scaling policies tested under load with documented behavior

items.note:
Root cause analysis completed and potential issue identified; fix is being worked on.

items.usecase: Helps resolve incorrect redirection and ensures users reach the correct website.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause identified
Fix implemented
Issue resolved
Dashboards deployed
Monitoring active
Alerts configured

items.text: Script for local environment of GCP
items.note: Script for local environment of GCP for testing
acceptanceCriteria: Script works locally
Documentation complete
Team can use independently

items.note: Building Docker Compose-based local staging environment replicating production architecture (API, database, cache, queues) to enable rapid testing and validation before deployment. Includes seed data scripts, environment variable templates, and integration with existing CI/CD pipeline for automated testing.
items.usecase: Reduces deployment cycle time by 60% (2 days → 8 hours) through earlier bug detection, eliminates 'works on my machine' issues, enables parallel development without environment conflicts, and provides safe testing ground for infrastructure changes before production deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Full staging stack runs locally with single command (docker-compose up)
CI/CD pipeline executes integration tests against local staging
Comprehensive documentation with troubleshooting guide published
Team trained and using local staging for pre-deployment validation

items.text: add make test for deploying test pod to GKE
acceptanceCriteria: Make test command works
Pod deploys successfully
Tests pass

items.text: Move Qdrant and Assistant Service from AWS to GCP
acceptanceCriteria: Services migrated to GCP
Performance maintained
Cost reduced
